name: load_features
short_description: Load Tcl commands for a specified feature.
full_help:
load_features

Description: 
Load Tcl commands for a specified feature.

Syntax: 
load_features  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<features>...]

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<features>]  Feature(s) to load, use list_features for a list of available 
                features.

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
